summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Artistry Family Salon booking website. All core functionality working perfectly including multi-step booking flow, admin authentication, booking management, and responsive design.
passed_tests: Home page hero section with correct styling and CTA
Navigation bar sticky behavior with all menu items
WhatsApp FAB visible on all pages
Services page with tabs for different categories
Multi-step booking flow (4 steps) with progress bar
Booking confirmation screen with WhatsApp pre-filled link
Gallery page with filter buttons and image grid
Contact page with form and embedded Google map
Footer with salon info on all customer pages
Complete user journey from homepage to booking confirmation
